title: taraxacum furvum
intro: Taraxacum furvum is a lesser-known dandelion species native to Eastern Europe and Asia, belonging to the same genus as the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Taraxacum furvum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support immune system function. Taraxacum furvum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
